headings: h2: I'm Pat McFadden, your local Labour MP for Wolverhampton South East
homepage.text_excerpt: Pat McFadden MP Skip to main content Pat McFadden MP Bilston South, Bilston North, East Park, Ettingshall North, Ettingshall South and Spring Vale, Bentley and Darlaston North, Darlaston South, Willenhall South. Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News My Work in Parliament Surveys Testimonials More Search Search the website Search Menu Pat McFadden MP I'm Pat McFadden, your local Labour MP for Wolverhampton South East I'm proud to represent Bilston, Darlaston, Willenhall, and all of Wolverhampton South East in Parliament. If you have a concern you'd like to raise with me, please get in touch. Get in touch Pat McFadden MP Launch of Wolves Tech Aid Visit to Atlas Refurb in Bilston Visit to Orchard Florist Bilston Prev Next Follow on Facebook Pat McFadden MP Contact details Crescent House Broad Street Bilston WV14 0BZ Crescent House Broad Street Bilston WV14 0BZ '> View on Google Maps Email: patrick.mcfadden.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sadia Ghani on behalf of Pat McFadden both at Crescent House, Broad Street, Bilston, WV14 0BZ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
